V-M-FOUNDATION-SETTINGS.evidence: Settings frozen, env-prefix AISW_, defaults for log_level/workspace/db URLs.

V-M-FOUNDATION-LOGGING.evidence: structlog JSON renderer, ISO UTC timestamps, correlation_id contextvar bound/reset.

V-M-AUTH-USERS.evidence: users.toml parsed/validated; allowlist atomic swap; SIGHUP+watchdog 500ms debounce; sha256 short-circuit.

V-M-STORAGE.evidence: WAL, synchronous=NORMAL, foreign_keys=ON, busy_timeout=5000 applied per connection.

V-M-STORAGE-JOBS.evidence: jobs/tracker_answers/jobs_dlq schema via alembic baseline; JobPayload discriminated union round-trips (parse_job_payload); PRAGMAs verified on engine.

V-M-STORAGE-AUDIT.evidence: 10 tables present per D-006 amendment (alembic baseline); PRAGMAs verified; append-only invariants.

commands.cmd: uv run pytest tests/unit/test_runtime_wiring.py tests/unit/test_router_adapter.py tests/unit/test_librarian_adapter.py -q
uv run python -m ai_steward_wiki # manual smoke with AISW_TG_BOT_TOKEN_LOCAL

V-M-RUNTIME-WIRING.evidence: Unit tests cover sync-URL derivation, data-dir creation, users.toml load fallbacks, signal handler wiring, _amain composition with mocks, missing-token fail-fast, main → asyncio.run. aisw-hcl: VoiceHandler/PhotoIngestor wired into DefaultPipeline; media _staging sweep job registered; _WikiRunnerAdapter.run promotes staged media into <wiki>/raw/media after a successful run. aisw-dsg: _RouterAdapter — ensure_inbox_wiki, _render_raw_sidecar, run_wiki_session in Inbox-WIKI/ with prompts/inbox.md, parse_router_reply, WikiRunnerError→RouterError, inbox.router.* markers. aisw-zd9: _LibrarianAdapter — resolve_target_wiki (create new dir; ROUTE-missing → create + warning; cap → rejected; bad name → rejected), stage_raw_into_wiki (raw/<ts>_text.md + promote media), run_wiki_session with wiki_id=f"{tid}/<Name>" + overlay=domain-default.md + timeout_s=None, IngestOutcome(ok|run_failed|rejected), WikiRunnerError→run_failed keeps the raw, inbox.route.* markers via capsys. Manual smoke: `python -m ai_steward_wiki` starts, logs runtime.media_pipeline.wired + polling.start, Ctrl-C → shutdown.done, exit 0.

commands.cmd: uv run pytest tests/unit/tg/test_handlers.py tests/unit/tg/test_pipeline.py tests/unit/tg/test_pipeline_document.py -q

V-M-TG-HANDLERS-WIRING.evidence: Unit tests cover callback parsing (8 variants), router/dispatcher wiring (7 message handlers: text/voice/photo/audio/video_note/document/callback), _download_bytes, text/voice/photo/audio/video_note/document/confirm dispatch with fake aiogram Message+CallbackQuery, L1 dedup short-circuit, photo→runner(media_paths)→deliver, photo+caption, photo L2 dedup, image-document routed, STT-unavailable graceful path, fallback acks when voice/photo handlers absent. aisw-hcl (media handling): F.audio + F.video_note route to on_voice; photo handler forwards message.caption; on_photo runs Claude vision via the wiki pipeline.

V-M-TG-PIPELINE-CLASSIFIER.evidence: Unit tests cover text happy path, L1 dup short-circuit, L2 dedup hit, classifier error → ACK_CLASSIFY_ERR_RU, runner error → ACK_RUNNER_ERR_RU, empty runner output → ACK_TEXT_RU via deliver, back-compat None injection, voice happy/empty/back-compat, structlog markers via capsys; aggregate_text across stream-json payload shapes. aisw-dsg: routable intents with a wired Router go through router.route(); router=None / non-routable use the legacy path; RouterError → ACK_RUNNER_ERR_RU; tg.pipeline.router.* markers. aisw-zd9: a ROUTE/CREATE_WIKI RouterDecision (with a wired librarian + output) → librarian.ingest() → status="ok" → output.deliver(reply); status="rejected"|"run_failed" → send_message(reply); CLARIFY/REJECT and librarian=None → send_message(decision.notes), legacy runner NOT called; tg.pipeline.route.* markers via capsys.

V-M-TG-PIPELINE-STREAMING.evidence: 7 unit tests cover fast path (no placeholder, single deliver), slow path (placeholder + buffered+live feeds + final aggregate), runner exception (finalize editor + ACK_RUNNER_ERR_RU via sender), back-compat None injection, aggregate_text-as-truth, outcome.text fallback, empty-outcome ACK_TEXT_RU fallback. 3 unit tests cover run_wiki_session on_event callback (per-event delivery, exception swallow+log, no-callback back-compat). Full suite 385/385 green; make lint and grace lint clean.

V-M-CLAUDE-CLI-COMMON.evidence: resolve_binary (/-path short-circuit + shutil.which), build_env (CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR + minimal PATH only), neutral_cwd (no project CLAUDE.md auto-discovery), system_prompt_argv (inlines prompt file content), truncate_stderr (UTF-8 decode + length cap).

commands.cmd: uv run pytest tests/unit/auth/test_onboarding.py tests/unit/auth/test_admin.py tests/unit/auth/test_lint_onboarding.py -q

V-M-ONBOARD-ADMIN.evidence: pending_users idempotent upsert + TTL purge; intro template slug validation (REQUIRED_SLUGS, lint_onboarding); AdminService approve/reject/elevate/demote with admin gating (NotAnAdmin) + admin_events trail (D-028); ShadowEmitter default LoggingShadowEmitter.

V-M-SCHEDULER.evidence: build_scheduler (AsyncIOScheduler + SQLAlchemyJobStore, D-003); PriorityJobQueue 5 lanes FIFO tiebreak; WikiLockManager 3-tier acquire/release + stale-PID recovery; classify_exception taxonomy + FailureCounter 3-strikes auto-disable (D-019); move_to_dlq writes jobs_dlq; kill_with_sequence SIGTERM→grace→SIGKILL (D-021); register_all_retention_jobs wires purge-pending + media _staging sweep + retention.

V-M-CLASSIFIER-STAGE0.evidence: classify orchestrates backend call + Pydantic validation + audit prompt_versions upsert + structlog; PromptCache semver+sha256 with reload(); Intent closed enum (D-009); parse_time dateparser→Haiku-fallback→escalate (D-010); ClaudeCliBackend resolves binary + JSON-mode envelope; AnthropicApiBackend optional; FakeClaudeRunner deterministic; INV-6 settings guard; ClassifierTimeoutError/SchemaError taxonomy.

commands.cmd: uv run pytest tests/unit/wiki/test_runner.py tests/unit/wiki/test_runner_aggregate.py tests/unit/wiki/test_runner_on_event.py tests/unit/wiki/test_streaming.py tests/unit/wiki/test_acquire.py -q

V-M-WIKI-RUNNER.evidence: run_wiki_session: assemble_prompt (base+overlay+per-WIKI CLAUDE.md atomic write), WikiLockAdapter acquire, spawn `claude --output-format stream-json`, parse_stream_json events, hard timeout + kill-sequence (WikiRunnerTimeoutError), on_event callback (per-event delivery, exception swallow); aggregate_text across stream-json shapes; classify_line pure mapping; AsyncioSpawner default.

V-M-WIKI-LIFECYCLE.evidence: normalize_wiki_name Cyrillic→Latin ISO 9 + PascalCase + slug (D-008); WikiLifecycleManager owner-scoped create/lookup/list/soft_delete/restore with AntiSpamCapError + NearDuplicateMatch (Levenshtein ≤2) + TrashRetentionExpiredError (D-041); parse/render_frontmatter + managed/user-zone markers + load_template sha256 (D-039); preflight 5-step grounding → PreflightReport.

commands.cmd: uv run pytest tests/unit/inbox/test_materialize.py tests/unit/inbox/test_parser.py tests/unit/inbox/test_hint_cache.py tests/unit/inbox/test_staging.py -q

V-M-INBOX.evidence: ensure_inbox_wiki idempotent first-contact materialise (D-004); extract_inbox_hint parses "## Inbox hint" body or None (D-016); InboxHintCacheRepo UPSERT/get/invalidate + get_or_refresh_hint stat→cache-hit on (size,mtime) else read+sha256; stage_media atomic write to _staging/<run_id>_<sha8>.<ext>; promote_to_raw / promote_path_to_raw atomic move to raw/media/<ISO8601>_<sha8>.<ext>; sweep_staging TTL delete (D-022).

V-M-INBOX-ROUTER.evidence: parse_router_reply: happy path for each RouterIntent (route/create_wiki/clarify/reject), multi-line notes, target_wiki null/empty → None, preamble + quoted example → last ```router block wins, missing block → RouterDecision(intent=CLARIFY, parsed_ok=False, notes=trimmed-original-or-generic), unknown intent value → fallback, ROUTE/CREATE_WIKI without target → demoted to CLARIFY, RouterDecision frozen + extra=forbid, RouterError is an Exception (aisw-dsg; prompts/inbox.md ≥1.1.0).

V-M-INBOX-ROUTE.evidence: resolve_target_wiki: CREATE_WIKI → new dir, created=True; idempotent second call → created=False; ROUTE existing → created=False; ROUTE missing → create + on_route_missing callback; AntiSpamCapError → RouteRejection("cap"); WikiNameError → RouteRejection("bad_name"). stage_raw_into_wiki: text → raw/<ts>_text.md body verbatim, media_rel=[]; voice/photo → .md sidecar with YAML front-matter + promote_path_to_raw into raw/media/ (StagedRaw.media_abs absolute & exists, source moved); already-gone media → skipped. pick_domain_overlay: domain-<slug>.md if present else domain-default.md. build_ingest_prompt references the raw path(s) + the user text (aisw-zd9; D-004).

V-M-INGEST-IDEM.evidence: IdempotencyService.check_update_id (L1 tg_updates, 24h TTL), check_content (L2 seen_files, SHA-256, 30d TTL), record_dedup_choice (dedup_hits); normalize_text NFKC+strip+lower+collapse-ws for text hashing; compute_content_hash per ContentKind; SeenFileMatch on collision (D-018 amended 2026-05-10, INV-4).

V-M-OPS-PII.evidence: PIIRedactor tiered redaction (NIST SP 800-122) with HMAC secret + on/off toggles + make_structlog_processor; module-level redact convenience; purge_user GDPR endpoint admin-gated + allow-listed stores (D-034 §10.4); RETENTION_POLICIES matrix; run_purge with dry_run + cutoff_utc/oldest_kept_utc; register_retention_jobs adds §10.4 cron; purge_trash_sweep tier-1/tier-2 final sweep; purge_staging wraps inbox.staging.sweep_staging.

V-M-OPS-BACKUP.evidence: snapshot_databases VACUUM INTO state/snapshots/<UTC>/ for jobs/audit/sessions (0700 dirs); purge_old_snapshots 7d rolling retention; register_db_snapshot_job cron 03:00 UTC (D-037, INV-2/INV-3); restore test reloads a snapshot; init_wiki_git idempotent git init + .gitignore; format_commit_message "<job_id>(<category>): <title>"; auto_commit stage-all + commit, no-op when nothing staged; WikiGitError on CLI failure.

commands.cmd: uv run pytest tests/unit/tg/test_bot.py tests/unit/tg/test_middleware_auth.py tests/unit/tg/test_middleware_start_bypass.py tests/unit/tg/test_confirm.py tests/unit/tg/test_output.py tests/unit/tg/test_stream_edit.py -q

V-M-TG-TEXT.evidence: build_bot (HTML parse_mode) + build_dispatcher (AllowlistMiddleware outer); AllowlistMiddleware denies unknown telegram_id with DENY_TEXT_RU + auth.deny, /start bypass, carries user_record (D-031, D-042); ConfirmationService auto/implicit/explicit + 10min TTL + compute_payload_hash + 3-button keyboard (D-023); deliver_output ≤3500 inline / ≤10000 ChainSplitter (i/M footer, ≤3 parts) / >10000 HaikuSummarizer→LengthCapSummarizer + RunOutput persistence (D-024, D-025); HtmlBalancer tag balancing; StreamEditor 1.5s/Δ≥50 throttle + chain-split at 4000 + final-flush on end/exception/cancel (D-026).

V-M-TG-VOICE.evidence: FasterWhisperTranscriber lazy CTranslate2 int8 CPU model, ru/en, RTF target ≤0.5, fallback lang ru, raises VoiceUnavailableError on missing faster-whisper; VoiceHandler stages bytes via inbox.staging.stage_media then transcribes → (MediaRef, Transcript) (D-022); audio + video_note route here from handlers.

V-M-TG-PHOTO.evidence: PhotoIngestor stages photo bytes to _staging/ via inbox.staging.stage_media → MediaRef; PHOTO_MIME_TO_EXT closed mapping of allowed photo MIME types; photos (and image-documents) run Claude vision via the wiki pipeline media_paths (D-022, tech-spec §9).
